title: Horecamaterialen De Meester NV ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] "Horecamaterialen De Meester NV" is a Belgium-based company that specializes in the wholesale of hospitality equipment. They have a wide range of products necessary for the daily operation of hotels, restaurants, and cafes. These include kitchen appliances, furniture, utensils, and tableware. Established in 1980, they are known for their extensive collection and quality customer service.
